For Authorized site auditing and Go Separate evidence from confidence · Review Sensitive Retention, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Redacting final reports eliminates privacy risk from crawl state.

stimulus.title: Sensitive Retention case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Go team handles case 5864 during a keyboard-first accessible report review. Build deterministic Go evidence to defend authenticated authority, secrets, request effects, output sinks, retention, and derived privacy state; browser Go remains deterministic and free of native network, parser, filesystem, process, and host effects; then change one fuzz, race, mutation, capacity, binary, deployment, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Minimize, classify, encrypt where required, restrict, expire, delete, and audit sensitive values across all derivatives.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Redacting final reports eliminates privacy risk from crawl state.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Minimize, classify, encrypt where required, restrict, expire, delete, and audit sensitive values across all derivatives. Artifact under review: least-authority secure crawl boundary.

options.text: The Sensitive Retention record says least-authority secure crawl boundary looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Sensitive Retention.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner permission, revision, URL and robots policy, body and parser limits, record and graph provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, Colly differences, changed fixtures, privacy, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as Go crawler proof. This does not satisfy Sensitive Retention for least-authority secure crawl boundary.
The record names the assumption, applies Sensitive Retention, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.why: Retrieving Sensitive Retention through the concrete least-authority secure crawl boundary case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized site auditing and Go Record what required effort · Review Sensitive Retention, keep Sensitive Retention connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Minimize, classify, encrypt where required, restrict, expire, delete, and audit sensitive values across all derivatives.
